payload.answer: Reject the proposed update. "Sara is Daniele's niece" directly conflicts with the existing durable memory "Sara is Daniele's daughter" and should not overwrite it without stronger evidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed statement refers to the same named entities (Sara, Daniele) and introduces a directly conflicting family relationship with an existing durable memory.

details: Detected a direct contradiction on the same relationship pair.
No durable memory was written from the proposed statement.

repair_options: If needed, record the new claim only as an unverified, low-confidence conflict note with source attribution.
Request clarification or evidence to determine whether the relationship was misstated.
